arts.ttl: FSG plans take shape after shock Liverpool exits and u-turn on club sale
arts.sum: Fourteen years this week since FSG purchased Liverpool FC for £300m, Paul Gorst assesses where the Reds custodians now sit in a Premier League awash with billionaire ownership groups of varied reputations

arts.ttl: Sunday's Premier League predictions including Liverpool vs. Chelsea
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Liverpool vs. Chelsea.

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Chelsea: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: Blues in fine form for Anfield trip

arts.ttl: Arne Slot made Liverpool preference clear - so this is where my head's at now
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Caoimhin Kelleher sits down to talk through his situation at Liverpool as he gets set to deputise for Alisson Becker for the coming weeks at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool know what must change vs 'embarrassing' Chelsea even after Gary Neville overstepped mark
arts.sum: Fewer clubs in the Premier League have more contrasting approaches than Liverpool and Chelsea and Arne Slot could be in for an eye-opener at Anfield this weekend

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Graeme Souness takes aim at Man Utd owners after Jurgen Klopp admission
arts.sum: Liverpool are back in action against Chelsea this weekend amid reports surrounding Graeme Souness, Jurgen Klopp and a potential future transfer for goalkeeper Caoimhin Kelleher

arts.ttl: Chelsea XIs vs Liverpool as Jadon Sancho dropped and Christopher Nkunku starts
arts.sum: Joe's XI : Sanchez; Gusto, Fofana, Tosin, Veiga; Fernandez, Caicedo; Madueke, Palmer, Neto; Nkunku. While Nicolas Jackson has impressed so far this season, I think up against Virgil van Dijk I'd fancy Christopher Nkunku to cause some more issues with his link-up play, so he starts.

arts.ttl: 'There's no point' - Caoimhin Kelleher rejects transfer claim as Liverpool 'frustration' made clear
arts.sum: Caoimhin Kelleher is set to deputise for Alisson Becker over the coming weeks in goal at Liverpool

arts.ttl: 12 players who could miss Liverpool vs Chelsea as Enzo Maresca has defensive selection headache
arts.sum: Reece James, however, worked with Chelsea during the international break, but there are decisions to make about which match he will play this week. Illness also affected Carney Chukwuemeka before the international break, and there is a degree of doubt about whether he will return this weekend.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca shares true Jadon Sancho feelings with simple demand to Man Utd flop
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho signed for Chelsea on loan from Manchester United on transfer deadline day in August and has enjoyed an impressive start to the Premier League season
